titleStmt.title: SII 18.146: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 146. (B.K. No. 73 of 1934-35.) KAṆVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Mailāraliṅgappa temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 5th regnal year of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalladēva, Dundubhi, Bhādrapada śu. 3, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1142, August 25, Monday, f.d.t. ·58.

It records a gift of money made for burning a perpetual lamp to god Mūlasthānadēva, by Māramarasa, the Heggaḍe of Daṇḍanāyaka Lakshmīdharadēva, the officer of achchu-pannāya. The gift was entrusted to Jñānaśakti-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mattaṁ svasti śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpaca
kravartti jagadēkamalladēvavarṣada 5 neya du(ṁ)ndubhi
saṁvatsarada bhādrapada suddha 3 sōmavāra byatīpātadandu
śrīmadaccupannāyadadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ daṇḍanāyaka lakṣmī
dharadēvara heggaḍe Eṁṭūrada kēṇikāṟa māra
marasaru śrīmūlasthānadēvargge naṁdādīvigege naḍevantā
gi Ā dēvara tōṁṭada kōlalu pannāyadoḷage hēṟiṁge Oṁdu pa
ṇamaṁ dēvargge naḍavaṁtāgi jñānasaktipaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi śrīmūlasthānadēvarige Ācaṁ
drārkkasthāyivaraṁ saluvaṁtāgi biṭṭaru .A few lines after this are completely worn out.
Digital edition of SII 18.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
